productDisplayName: Baggit Women Pride Taj Purple Handbag
description: A practical and stylish choice of bag from baggit. Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth leather effect fabric and smart handles will give a sophisticated look to any outfit. Height: 27 cm Width: 35 cm Depth: 15 cm Made of woven fabric Two padded handles and a detachable shoulder strap A zippered pocket at the back Three main zippered compartments One zippered pocket inside the second compartment Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
